mainEntity.name: How can I engage Virtual Auditor for investor exit valuation india?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contact us at +91-99622 60333 (call/WhatsApp) or email support@virtualauditor.in. The initial consultation is free with no obligation. We will assess your requirements and provide a clear scope, timeline, and fee quote.

Virtual Auditor is led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA), Associate Company Secretary (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333). This multi-credential profile enables integrated advisory across valuation, tax, corporate law, and forensic accounting.

mainEntity.name: Does Virtual Auditor serve clients outside India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve clients across India. Most engagements are handled digitally, with in-person meetings available at any of our three offices.
